channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AAA Study on EV Range and Temperature
item.description: AAA research investigates the impact of temperature on electric vehicle range.

item.title: DHS Shutdown Ends; May Day Protests Anticipated
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown is over. May Day protests are planned nationwide.

item.title: Quiz: Key Actions of the Trump Administration
item.description: Evaluate your understanding of recent federal policy and events.

item.title: AI System Used in Employee Termination
item.description: An employee's termination, linked to an AI system, is facing legal scrutiny in Hangzhou.
